LanguageData.CustomLordNameTip: Automatically searches for lords matching the name and joins them at generation, or creates a lord with the job "CQF Custom Action" if this is empty.
LanguageData.DesignatorLordDesc: Customize lord within the map, lord data will be saved in the custom map def
LanguageData.CQFAction_Lord_Visit_Tip: Set the lord job as tovisit colony, and the group will leave the map after the duration
